page.title: Proyectos open source
page.intro: Lo que construyo cuando nadie me lo pide. Todo público en GitHub.

projects.name: MAVIS
projects.pitch: Sistema multimodal end-to-end que predice si un video va a funcionar en TU canal y recupera los más parecidos a una idea nueva. Embeddings de texto e imagen, retrieval híbrido, métricas con validación seria.

projects.name: Machine Learning Framework en C#
projects.pitch: Framework tipo PyTorch hecho desde cero en C#. Sistema de autograd dinámico para construir y entrenar redes neuronales sin depender de ninguna librería de ML.

projects.name: Evolutionary Neural Networks en Unity
projects.pitch: Redes neuronales entrenadas con algoritmos genéticos para crear bots autónomos en videojuegos. ML clásico aplicado, sin gradient descent.

projects.name: Discord bot con LLaMA
projects.pitch: Bot de Discord con LLM local. Demuestra el ciclo completo de aplicar un LLM open source a un caso de uso real sin depender de APIs de pago.

projects.name: Pequeroku
projects.pitch: Plataforma ligera de contenedores basada en QEMU para entornos aislados. Sistemas, infra y arquitectura, no IA.

page.title: Open source projects
page.intro: What I build when nobody asks me to. All public on GitHub.

projects.name: MAVIS
projects.pitch: End-to-end multimodal system that predicts whether a video will perform on YOUR channel and retrieves the closest existing videos to a new idea. Text and image embeddings, hybrid retrieval, metrics with proper validation.

projects.name: Machine Learning Framework in C#
projects.pitch: PyTorch-style framework built from scratch in C#. Dynamic autograd engine to build and train neural networks without depending on any ML library.

projects.name: Evolutionary Neural Networks in Unity
projects.pitch: Neural networks trained with genetic algorithms to create autonomous bots in video games. Applied classical ML, no gradient descent.

projects.name: Discord bot with LLaMA
projects.pitch: Discord bot powered by a local LLM. Shows the full cycle of applying an open-source LLM to a real use case without depending on paid APIs.

projects.name: Pequeroku
projects.pitch: Lightweight container platform based on QEMU for isolated environments. Systems, infra and architecture, not AI.
